title: chamaemelum glabrum
intro: Chamaemelum glabrum, also known as White Chamomile, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of White Chamomile include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and soothing digestive issues, as well as its potential to ease symptoms of insomnia and menstrual cramps. White Chamomile is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its benefits.
